description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called changes and a job named update::readme that runs in the alpine:3.8 Docker image. In the before_script the job installs git and bash via apk, clones the repository using the CI token ($TOKEN_GITLAB) and the repository URL ($CI_REPOSITORY_URL), configures git user.email and user.name, and changes into the project directory ($CI_PROJECT_NAME). The job runs only when any README.md file changes (patterns '**/**/README.md' and '**/README.md') and is excluded if the commit message matches /Gitlab/. In the script it executes ./CHANGELOG.sh, adds README.md, commits with the message '[Gitlab] Update README.md' (ignoring errors), and pushes to origin master (ignoring errors).
